---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for lore-auth-oidc
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Is it related to a specific OIDC
provider, deployment scenario, or a limitation of the current MVP (in-memory
sessions/user directory, single issuer/client, wildcard-only authorization)?

## Proposed solution

Describe the change you'd like to see. Include relevant configuration,
environment variables, or API surface changes.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches or workarounds you've tried.

## Security / authorization impact

Does this touch claim resolution, token issuance, session handling, or
authorization policy? If so, describe the impact.

## Additional context

Anything else — links, references, related upstream Lore behavior.
